_comment: Retired in patch 0.5 'Return of the Ancients'. The 13 VaalImplicit_* entries this file used to carry were fabricated — no such mods exist in poe2db's 0.5 data. The REAL Vaal-corruption pool (Corruption* mods, kind = corrupted) already ships via the RePoE-fork source, and the engine's enchantment-affix sampler draws from it directly. This file stays only so the fixture loader's schema remains stable; entries must stay empty.

_schema.name: human-readable affix name
_schema.required_level: minimum ilvl for Vaal corruption to roll this entry
